violations.text: The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish/glass machine at the kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025

Establishment is lacking a 3-bay sink for proper washing, rinsing and sanitizing. A sink with at least three (3) compartments shall be provided for manually washing, rinsing, and SANITIZING EQUIPMENT and UTENSILS. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025
